race.description: Racing NSW Prov. Midway Championship Qualifier
race.comment: WOOLOOWIN (11) got too far back before making minor headway behind the in-form Cinsault last start over 1300m at Randwick. May show a bit more early enterprise today with the winkers going on. Nicely in at the weights and has the figures to take this out. BUFFALO (4) is the intriguing runner, back from a 315-day lay-off. Has not raced since his impressive juvenile season, highlighted by a luckless and very close third in the Sires at Randwick over this distance. Has trialled three times since early January and looks sharp. More than capable. OAKFIELD JUPITER (12) was fair first-up over 1200m at Randwick. Won a Rosehill Midway second-up last prep over 1300m. Will be ready to put it all together for this important assignment. LORD OF BISCAY (1) is back from a 14-week break. Flew home to grab third when fresh from a spell over 1200m at Rosehill last prep. Watch for him late. MIDNIGHT OPAL (2) back from an eight-week let-up is a threat with the help of a lovely gate.
